case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. SEASTRUNK, WILLIE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT BLACK, BERNITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON MAY-08-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEASTRUNK, WILLIE BLACK, BERNITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH ST, #334, STAYED UNTIL MAY-23-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WAIVES RENTS & DAMAGES THROUGH 5/23/95; DEFTS. WAIVE RIGHT TO APPLY TO COURT FOR A STAY OF EXECUTION BEYOND PERIOD SPECIFIED; (SEE JUDGMENT).
